body_text:
25:10 â April 30, 2025
FX Notes Plus Update
We updated the FX Notes Plus part. When buying foreign currency, you must only enter the denominations of the currency notes you are buying into the denomination fields. You must not leave the denomination fields blank and submit the transaction with a Mixed Notes total.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 10.2, Buying Foreign Currency
We removed an alternative note that said to leave denomination fields blank and submit the transaction with a Mixed Notes total.
